verses.text: Topa in uk hi. Leitung lungdam hen la, tuikulh neu tampite zong lungdam ta uh hen
Meiipite leh khuamial sahpite ama kiimah om a, thumanna leh thutan'nate ama tokhom bulpi ahi hi
Ama mai-ah mei pai a, ama kiima om a galte a kangtum hi
Ama khuaphialepte in leitung taangsak a, leitung in mu-in a ling hi
Topa' mai, leitung mi khempeuh' Topa' mai-ah mual liante khuainun bangin a tuisuak uh hi
Vantungte in ama thumanna genkhia uh a, mi khempeuh in ama minthan'na mu uh hi
Bangmah a manlo milimte a kisaktheihpih, milim a bia mi khempeuhte maizumin kikoih a, ama mai-ah pasian khempeuh kun uh hi
Pasian aw, Zion in za-in nuam a, na thukhennate hangin Judah khuapite lungdam uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, leitung khempeuh a ukpa na hi a, pasian dang khempeuh sangin nakpi takin na lianzaw hi
Topa in gitlohna a mudahte it a, amah in a mi siangthote' nuntakna siatna ding pan a kem hi. Amah in migilote' khutsung panin amaute a honkhia hi
Thuman mite' tungah khuavak hong taang a, lungsim thutang mite tungah lungdamna hong tung hi
Thuman mite aw, Topa' nasepnate hangin lungdam un la, ama min siangtho phat un.
